title: CCL - Close/reopen the app
scenario: CCL (Call/Chat Control Level) setting does not persist after closing and reopening the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Bluetooth audio device that supports Call/Chat Control Level (CCL) is connected.
From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
Select a CCL value (e.g., Low, Medium, or High).
Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Return to Device Settings → Advanced for the same connected device.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting (e.g., Low, Medium, or High) is still displayed and selected in the Advanced settings.
